overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizard-themed game showing a character in robes and hat exploring a grand Gothic castle interior. The character ascends a monumental bifurcated staircase, traverses an upper corridor, and enters a vast candlelit hall with ornate stone architecture and stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with bifurcated staircase

events.description: character begins ascending the left stone staircase

agents.ego_description: walking toward the grand staircase and climbing the left side while passing other students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes descending the left staircase
student sitting on the steps of the right staircase

entered.detail: large golden illuminated crest mounted on the wall between the staircases
wide stone staircase with steps leading upward to the left
wide stone staircase with steps leading upward to the right
intricately carved stone railing with Gothic patterns
lit wall-mounted lanterns providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a grand Gothic entrance hall facing an illuminated crest on the far wall between two bifurcated stone staircases. Warm lantern light illuminates the marble floor as the character approaches and begins ascending the left staircase, passing other students who are descending or sitting on the steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to upper level

events.description: character reaches the top of the stairs and turns right onto the upper balcony

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase toward the upper level, passing a descending student

notable_agents.action: student descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: tall narrow stained glass windows with blue light filtering through
stone railing along the upper balcony edge
massive dark wooden double doors at the end of the upper corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the left stone staircase, passing tall stained glass windows that emit a blue glow. The ornate Gothic railing continues alongside as the character climbs. Upon reaching the top, the character turns right toward large wooden doors at the end of the upper balcony corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor leading to great hall entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony corridor toward the large wooden doors

entered.detail: patterned marble floor of the upper balcony walkway
decorative stone railing overlooking the lower level
pointed Gothic arch framing the entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the upper balcony corridor with stone railings on the left overlooking the grand staircase below. The corridor leads toward massive wooden double doors framed by a Gothic archway, illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with stained glass windows and house banners

events.description: character opens the large wooden doors and enters the candlelit great hall
character turns slightly to the right while walking to explore the hall

agents.ego_description: opening the large wooden doors and stepping into the vast great hall, then walking toward the center

notable_agents.action: student standing near the center of the great hall facing away

entered.detail: expansive patterned marble floor of the great hall
tall arched stained glass windows high on the far wall
vertical banners hanging from the walls displaying house colors
tall cylindrical stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
decorative wall hanging with intricate designs

segments.scene_description: The character opens the massive wooden doors and enters a vast great hall illuminated by candlelight. Tall stained glass windows line the upper walls while house banners hang between massive stone pillars. The character walks across the patterned marble floor toward another student standing near the center, then turns to approach doors on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall approaching far exit doors

events.description: character approaches the far wooden doors on the right side of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking across the great hall toward the far side wooden doors

entered.detail: large carved wooden double doors on the far side of the hall
stone statue set into a wall niche

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the great hall, passing between massive stone pillars that now appear on the left. The character approaches a set of large carved wooden doors on the far side of the hall, passing wall sconces and a stone statue in a niche.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand Gothic entrance hall, ascending through an upper corridor and culminating in a vast, candlelit great hall. It begins on a marble floor facing an illuminated crest, moving forward as the character ascends a bifurcated stone staircase past other students. As the climb continues, the lighting shifts to a blue glow from tall stained glass windows before the camera turns right at the summit to follow a balcony corridor overlooking the stairs below. The scene then expands as the character opens massive wooden double doors, transitioning into a cavernous hall filled with floating candlelight, house banners, and towering stone pillars. Finally, the camera glides across a patterned marble floor, passing a stone statue in a niche before approaching a set of carved wooden doors on the far side of the hall.
